eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Snohomish, WA; at 12:36 AM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 1:06 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is a test, only a test, of the Emergency Alert System, from the
Snohomish County 911. Had this been an actual alert, this system would bring
you important information No action is needed. This is only a test.
